summary: Do not ship: the brief-link write path does not actually confine `briefPath` to `briefsPath`, and the Discuss column still exposes a non-Move advance path that moves cards out of the interactive list.

findings.title: `recordBrief` accepts any relative project path, not just paths under `briefsPath`
findings.recommendation: Make `isSafeBriefPath` enforce containment within the configured `briefsPath` after normalization, and have `handleBriefCard` pass the same configured `briefsPath` through. Today `package.json`, `docs/x.md`, or `./other-dir/file` all pass because only absolute paths and `..` segments are rejected.

findings.title: Discuss cards can still be advanced via the generic Start/Advance action instead of manual Move
findings.recommendation: Remove the Start/Advance path for interactive lists and require the existing Move flow for Discuss. The current `/cards/:id/start` behavior advances any interactive/manual card to `validNext[0]`, and the UI still renders that action for Discuss cards.

findings.title: The Discuss UI still renders an `Advance` button for interactive cards, enabling the wrong workflow
findings.recommendation: Hide the primary Start/Advance button for `list.interactive` cards, or route it to the explicit Move sheet instead of `/cards/:id/start`. Acceptance says Discuss advances by manual Move, not by a dedicated advance action.
